description: JTN-407: narrow-scope Renovate config. Dependabot (see dependabot.yml)
still owns the bulk of dependency updates for pip, npm, and
github-actions. Renovate is only enabled here for kombu + redis
because Dependabot cannot express the 'bump kombu AND redis together'
rule we need for the kombu 5.6.x <-> redis 7.x incompatibility.

packageRules.description: Ignore everything by default. Dependabot owns the rest.

description: Watch kombu for >= 5.7.0. When it ships, bump redis to 7.x at the
same time (see the comment above the redis pin in
backend/requirements.txt). Both packages land in a single PR so
CI runs them together and we don't get a half-upgrade.
prBodyNotes: kombu 5.6.x pins redis <6, so we cannot move to redis 7.x until
kombu 5.7.0 ships with the compatibility fix. This PR bumps both
at once; please verify Celery worker startup locally before

description: Companion rule: when the kombu bump above fires, allow redis to
move to any 7.x release. Dependabot is pinned at redis==6.4.0
today via the explicit pin in requirements.txt.
